description_long: This is a tan, armored combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, angular body and reinforced doors, designed for urban and military operations. It features a prominent roof-mounted machine gun turret with protective shielding and a visible ammunition box. The vehicle has four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads, suitable for traversing rough terrain. The exterior is equipped with metal grilles, side mirrors, and antennae, and the windows are small and likely bullet-resistant. Markings, including numbers and insignia, are visible on the sides and rear, indicating military use. The paint scheme is a solid desert tan, optimized for blending into arid environments.
description: A tan, armored combat tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted machine gun, reinforced doors, and rugged off-road tires. Markings and military insignia are visible on its solid-colored exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille, reinforced bumper, and the centrally mounted roof machine gun.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two armored doors, side mirrors, and the full length of the roof-mounted weapon.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the vehicle's back markings, rear lights, and the continuation of the roof weapon mount.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing armored doors, the weapon mount, and side details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted machine gun turret with protective shield, centrally located.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body visible armor plating, including reinforced doors and sloped panels; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color, no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Black number '11-16' on rear, black insignia on side doors, and additional small stenciled text on sides.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, suitable for rugged terrain.
